invariants.name: no_unauthorized_payout
invariants.description: Contracts should not allow unauthorized payouts or transfers
invariants.check: require_auth() must be called before any transfer/payout function

invariants.name: no_unauthorized_state_mutation
invariants.description: Critical state should not be modifiable without proper authorization
invariants.check: require_auth() must be called before any state modification

invariants.name: pool_balance_integrity
invariants.description: Risk pool total balance should always equal sum of provider deposits minus payouts

invariants.name: policy_fund_locking
invariants.description: Policy funds should be locked during claim processing

invariants.name: claim_uniqueness
invariants.description: Each claim should be unique and not processed multiple times

invariants.name: governance_quorum
invariants.description: Governance proposals must meet quorum requirements

invariants.name: slashing_proportionality
invariants.description: Slashing amounts should be proportional to violations

business_logic.description: Business logic invariants that ensure correct behavior
